name: Arcwell Data
one_liner: Managed feature store for streaming ML.

founders.name: Ruben Castellanos
founders.resolution_note: GitHub handle rcastellanos and HN handle rcastell matched on a shared repository URL in the HN profile.

evidence.span: commit 2f81ba0 "as-of joins: never leak a feature value observed after the label"
"We are still pre-revenue. Everyone on Arcwell today is on a free design-partner agreement and we have not turned billing on."
"To be precise: six design partners, zero invoices sent. Pricing page goes up when the usage metering is trustworthy."

gate.rationale: The revenue claim is contradicted by the founder's own later public statement. The ordering rules out the benign explanation.

claims.corroborating_span: "We are still pre-revenue. Everyone on Arcwell today is on a free design-partner agreement and we have not turned billing on."
claims.timeline_verdict: counter-evidence is 51 days NEWER than the claim. A company cannot grow into being pre-revenue.
claims.note: Compare cx-tallwind, where the identical pair of statements appears in the opposite order and is scored as growth.

claims.claim_text: net revenue retention of 140% over the last two quarters
claims.note: Not independently checkable, and mechanically impossible alongside a pre-revenue position. Reported as unverifiable rather than false - we did not find a source, we reasoned about one.

trace_note: The verdict rests entirely on two timestamps. Both are visible in the trace and neither is inferred.
